name: axial-campaign-content
description: Shared compendium module for the Axial campaign (PF1e)

scripts.unpack:equipment: fvtt package unpack equipment --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out src/equipment
scripts.unpack:bestiary: fvtt package unpack bestiary --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out src/bestiary
scripts.unpack: npm run unpack:equipment && npm run unpack:bestiary
scripts.pack:equipment: fvtt package pack src/equipment --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out packs/equipment
scripts.pack:bestiary: fvtt package pack src/bestiary --type Module --id axial-campaign-content --out packs/bestiary
scripts.pack: npm run pack:equipment && npm run pack:bestiary
